framework: UNESCO AI Competency Framework for Teachers (AI-CFT) 2024
note: Performance-based competency mapping. Strength is a ceiling on observed evidence_strength. Scorer must add item-specific rationale and confidence.

WS6_tree_structure.rationale: Decision-tree worksheet: Constructs or represents a complete decision tree from data.

WS6_root_feature.rationale: Decision-tree worksheet: Selects root split feature — model structure decision.

WS6_root_threshold.rationale: Decision-tree worksheet: Sets root threshold — parameter evaluation.

WS6_inner_feature.rationale: Decision-tree worksheet: Selects inner-node feature for tree refinement.

WS6_root_labels.rationale: Decision-tree worksheet: Assigns class labels at root branches.

WS6_inner_labels.rationale: Decision-tree worksheet: Assigns class labels at inner branches.

WS6_leaves.rationale: Decision-tree worksheet: Specifies leaf outcomes completing tree representation.
